title: Identity
description: Global credential record. One row per real human across every Academorix Application. Owns email (citext, unique), password hash (argon2id preferred, bcrypt fallback), MFA secret (KMS-envelope-encrypted at rest), MFA recovery codes (bcrypt-hashed JSONB), email verification lifecycle, account lockout with progressive backoff, password history for reuse prevention. NEVER carries `application_id` or `tenant_id` — global by design (see design.md D1).

x-database.description: Global identities table. NO tenant scope. NO application scope. Referenced by user::User + user::PlatformUser via `identity_id`.

email.description: Case-insensitive UNIQUE via Postgres CITEXT extension. Falls back to `string` + LOWER() functional index on non-Postgres engines.

mfa_secret_encrypted.description: KMS-envelope-encrypted TOTP secret. NULL = MFA not enrolled.

mfa_recovery_codes_hashed.description: Array of bcrypt-hashed recovery codes. NULL = MFA not enrolled OR no codes issued.

email_verified_at.description: NULL until the user confirms email ownership.

email_verification_token_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the outstanding verification token (plaintext token NEVER stored).

email_verification_expires_at.description: Verification token expiry (24 hours from issue).

password_history_hashed.description: Rolling window of prior password hashes; oldest evicted when write pushes past history_size.

password_changed_at.description: Stamped on every password_hash mutation. Drives age-based rotation checks.

last_failed_at.description: Timestamp of the most recent failed login attempt. Drives the sliding-window failed_attempts_count reset.

locked_until.description: Non-null = active lockout. Auto-cleared by AutoUnlockExpiredLockoutsJob when expired.

failed_attempts_count.description: Reset on successful login OR after `lockout.window_minutes` of no failed attempts.

dob.description: Date of birth. Drives CompliantAgePolicy resolution (COPPA / GDPR floors). Nullable because platform-provisioned identities may lack it.

metadata.description: Free-form metadata bag from HasMetadata. Never used for security-critical state.

created_by.description: Actor who created the row (platform-admin CLI OR self-signup marker).

deleted_at.description: Soft-delete marker. GDPR erasure hold-period begins here.

indexes.name: identities_email_unique
indexes.description: Partial UNIQUE on live rows only. Configurable: `identity.retention.replace_erased_identities` (default true) allows a fresh sign-up on the same email during the GDPR hold-period.

indexes.name: identities_unverified_idx
indexes.predicate: email_verified_at IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL
indexes.description: Speeds up the unverified-identities gauge + activation-funnel dashboards.

email.description: RFC 5321 compliant. Length cap enforces the address-part max (64) + `@` + domain max (255).

email_fingerprint.description: Computed. SHA-256 of the normalised email.

is_locked.description: Computed. locked_until IS NOT NULL AND > now().

recovery_codes_remaining.description: Computed. Count of non-consumed entries in mfa_recovery_codes_hashed.

x-route-binding.notes: Identity is NEVER a URL parameter on tenant-audience routes. Only platform-admin routes bind it, and always by ULID (never by email — to avoid emitting email as a URL path segment).
